critiques.text: The claim that multi-model deliberation improves reasoning quality lacks empirical evidence in the research context.
critiques.whyItMatters: Without strong evidence, the core value proposition of the system is unsubstantiated.
critiques.proposedFix: Add citations to ensemble method studies in relevant domains

critiques.text: The cited evidence appears to be from a different domain and may not generalize.
critiques.whyItMatters: Domain mismatch can lead to incorrect conclusions about system effectiveness.

critiques.text: The research scope should be narrowed to focus on academic research validation.
critiques.whyItMatters: A narrower scope would make validation more tractable in early iterations.
